sections.paragraph:
verb לצבוע

to paint, color

verb להיצבע

be painted, colored

verb להצטבע

to paint oneself, put on make-up

verb להצביע

to vote; raise one's hand or finger; point at, hint

masculine noun

paint, dye, tint, color, hue, tinge, coloring, eyeshade, rouge, distemper

noun

painter, dyer
